asset_context.context_statement: Fictional defense-industrial edge appliance inventory. Sector and product-family level only; no live targets are named.

asset_seed_summary.basis_statement: Asset/SBOM-derived seeds identify CVE, package, product-family, and exposure-class metadata for targeted open-source enrichment.

defense_summary.patch_summary: Disable JNDI message lookups globally and harden the appender pattern; remove the lookup class as a defense-in-depth fallback.

sigma.title: Log4Shell JNDI Injection — HTTP Header and App Log Detection

strategic_frame.geographic_scope: US federal and allied Indo-Pacific defense ecosystem
strategic_frame.target_scope: US federal, defense-industrial, and critical-infrastructure perimeter services

strike_window.why_this_window: The May 14-15 Trump-Xi summit creates a high-value collection and positioning window around US-PRC negotiations. The historical Volt Typhoon and Ivanti anchors support edge and perimeter infrastructure as a durable PRC-nexus access pattern rather than a one-day burn event.

vector.defensive_implication: Prioritize detection, inventory, configuration review, and safe localhost validation around the selected perimeter-service class.
vector.target_sector: federal civilian agencies, defense contractors, and critical-infrastructure perimeter services
vector.why_this_vector: Volt Typhoon and Ivanti anchors both show edge or perimeter appliance access as a recurring state-linked pattern against US and allied infrastructure.

open_source_summary.basis_statement: Sanitized open-source metadata was integrated into the pilot evidence basis.

source_health.failure_policy: Failed sources are summarized in evidence; raw collection text remains excluded.

caveats: This artifact is a fixture and was not produced by a live engine run.
All target identifiers are placeholders ([LAB-HOST]); no live infrastructure is referenced.
Validation result mirrors the canonical Log4Shell mitigation outcome and is included only for Console rendering.

prediction_summary.top_one_day_class: Log4Shell-class Java logging framework remote code execution

safety_attestation.data_boundary_statement: No live target data is included; evidence contains only fixture, seeded-OSINT, product-family, and localhost sandbox metadata.
safety_attestation.validation_scope: localhost only; vulnerable-by-design sandbox container; no network egress beyond the sandbox validation channel
